claim_boundary: Bounded native LLVM/JIT claim gate: executable lowering evidence alone is not a promoted LLVM/JIT claim. Promotion requires verified beyond-scalar native execution, correctness test identifiers, crash-safety test identifiers, isolated benchmark artifact identifiers, rollback policy, and fallback policy; until every requirement is attached there is no LLVM/JIT promotion, provider, hardware, GPU, or performance claim.
fallback_policy: Use interpreted Program AD or the existing Python/Rust replay path for value-and-gradient execution whenever the native LLVM/JIT gate is not promotion-ready.
rollback_policy: Disable native LLVM/JIT promotion, withdraw any generated public claim row, and route release notes through the claim ledger if crash-safety tests, isolated benchmark artifacts, or dependency checks regress.
